zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Hughes於1522年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾哈利法可時，她的父親John Hughes22歲，母親Margaret Fletcher21歲。她於大約1540年與Edward Saint Loe在英國英格蘭波克夏金斯頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1593年2月2日在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾傑林頓享年71歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Hughes于1522年出生在英国英格兰越可爾哈利法可时，她的父亲John Hughes22岁，母亲Margaret Fletcher21岁。她于大约1540年与Edward Saint Loe在英国英格兰波克夏金斯頓结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1593年2月2日在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾傑林頓享年71岁。

nameMeanings.name: Hughes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Welsh: variant of Hugh with genitival or excrescent -s.
Irish and Scottish: adopted as an equivalent of Gaelic surnames based on the personal name Aodh ‘fire’, for example Ó hAodha, Mac Aodha; see McCoy and compare McHugh .

variants.name: Hugh
meanings: English, Welsh, and Scottish (of Norman origin): from the Old French personal name Hue, from ancient Germanic Hugo (ultimately derived from hugi- ‘mind, spirit’). This was a very popular name in England after the Norman Conquest, partly due to the reputation of Saint Hugh of Lincoln (1140–1200), who was born in Burgundy and who established the first Carthusian monastery in England.
Scottish and Irish: adopted as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic personal name Aodh, a derivative of a Gaelic word meaning ‘fire’. See Hughes .
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surnames 邱 and 丘, based on their Hakka pronunciation; see   Qiu   1 and 2.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Hughes was born in 1522, in Halifax, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, John Hughes, was 22 and her mother, Margaret Fletcher, was 21. She married Edward Saint Loe about 1540, in Kingston, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died on 2 February 1593, in Cherington, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 71.

Elle a épousé Edward Saint Loe environ 1540, à Kingston, Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 2 février 1593, à Cherington, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 71 ans.

ko.Saint John the Baptist Church, Halifax,: 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 할이파스 스트 존 테 바프티스트'스 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Hughes(이)가 1522년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 할이파스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Hughes(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Fletcher(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 대략 1540년 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 킨그스턴에서 Edward Saint Loe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1593년 2월 2일 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 처링턴에서 71세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.Saint John the Baptist Church, Halifax,: ст джон т баптист'с чурч, хэлифакс, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Hughes родилась в 1522 г. в местности хэлифакс, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Hughes было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Fletcher, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Edward Saint Loe около 1540 г. в местности кингстон, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла 2 февраля 1593 г. в местности чирингтон, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 71 год.
